column1: Hey joseph, just saw you filled out our Go Blue booking form. which destination were you looking to book for this spring?
Hey joseph, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Cool I got you. which destination were you lookin to book
Cabo, riu Santa Fe all inclusive
Word cabo is dope for sure. a little more on the pricey side but its a vibe
how many ppl in your group so far?
We already had a group of 2 book separately through jet blue travel. Same location but they'd be looking for just the party package
You want to hop on a call fast if your available?
yea lets do it. ill call you in a sec
will be from our main line, 888 # just a heads up
yoyo! would you want the booze cruise with the party pass as well?
Bet bet will email you this all in a few

yoyo so I just emailed a package with the 3 nights + airport transfers. what I think is best is, that 1 night we figure out where to get you tickets to the concert at ME and we make that your fourth night
How much just for the transportation to and from the airport? Just trying to have everything priced out on my sheet
$54 per person for the round trip
Okay so we'll take that out because we got a cheaper price through a different company, but let's for sure figure out the Matroda
So take that out of the pricing for now
word so just the 3 nights party pass for rn?
what pricing did you get for transportation? if you dont mind me asking
We have 180 total for 4 people, compliments drinks and champagne round trip
Liked “word so just the 3 nights party pass for rn?”
thats all updated on that link in the email
Liked “thats all updated on that link in the email”
I think lvinlife is the one with matroda
Okay perfect anyway you can inquire? If not we'll do it on our end
hey sorry i haven't heard back about it yet, idk if you guys heard anything
hey did you guys plan on grabbing those party passes?
Didn't get in touch with the matroda people yet how about you
Nah not just yet. It may be easiest for you to get them directly on their site or something
did you still want to do the base package for Squid Roe, Vaquita, and Mandala?
hey did you still want to grab those nights?
If we can't get in touch with this other company, I will for sure take it. We're trying to get the Matroda tickets in there.
I think we're ready to go ahead with you guys, would you mind hoping on a call in a few minutes?
hey man! yea no prob I can give you a call
No worries call me when you can,
Hey bro, gave you a call a little while ago, lmk when is best to call back
I never got it, let me give you a call in 10? Just finishing up with something
hey bro which hotel are you staying at again? was it Riu Santa Fe
Hey Spiffy, never got the email for the reservation. My email is joeypolizzi2004@gmail.com if you needed it again.
Hey bro will send this over now
hey bro you mentioned you want to do 4 nights?
my hold up has just been making sure I can line up the 4 nights with the days youre there. but I got it now, just want to make sure thats what you wanted
And again, we're not subject to just those clubs- example meaning we don't have to go to squid roe twice

You would be subject to those clubs, I added squid Roe twice since its the best in my opinion. But those venues are the 3 options. So if you want to go to Mandala or Vaquita twice just lmk and Ill adjust it
Okay. Let me check with the group
Or if youre not sure, we can stick to 3 nights, and you can add one more later on
yoyo, any update on what we wanna do?

Yo so we're going to do the 3 nights instead and chill at the hotel for one. Another question, are the clubs restricted to certain days? Where we would have to go to squid roe on Monday, then here Tuesday- etc or do we have the freedoms to choose
You typically hav the freedom to choose unless theres a massive special event going on. where its like closed to the public. I'll check for your dates and see if there are any. I dont think there was
Ill adjust it to 3 nights. I think thats a good plan
Okay, let me know if there's any special events
sup bro, adjusted your reservation to just 3 party pass nights. looked on the calendar, there arent any nights that are closed to the public during your dates
yoo, were y'all able to hop on that res?
Yes I'm on it have the guys filling it out as we speak
Hey spiffy, we all good for our reservation?
Hey spiffy, where do we go when we get to our hotel (riu Santa Fe) to get our passes
Hey man, head to the lobby and look for the Go Blue Tours staff wearing blue shirts, they'll be there until about 1pm would go by the morning
Hey spiffy, you have a minute to talk about our reservation?
Hey man. Currently in Punta Cana operating our program here and hands are tied

Hey spiffy so I'm having an amazing time in Cabo but the issue I'm having is that me and my group are not trying to go out into the city tonight like expressed when we booked this trip and they are giving us a hard time we went out last night to squid row and tonight we were planning on staying at the resort and then tomorrow and the next day (Wednesday & Thursday) we were planning on going to Mandala and squid Row again probably because when we booked this package, we said that there was gonna be one night that we did not go to the club and we chose it to be tonight. The tour guide is giving us an issue because he said that if we do not go out tonight that we are going to lose the night and that we only have one night left. We explained in much detail that there was going to be a night that we did not go out to the city and now we are being told that if we do not go out tonight, we're going to lose the night. That is not ok especially because we expressed that before booking the trip. I am hoping that we can get this figured out. Our plan is to stay at the resort tonight. And tomorrow (Wednesday) go to mandala and on Thursday go to squid again. I'm really hoping we can figure this out. We spent a lot of money on this party package and we would really like what we paid for.

Yea bro so it's lookin like Vaquita is only available tonight for this week. and Mandala is available on the 12th. there are other private events happening at those venues on other nights and/or they have nights that arent spring break party pass nights
so if you want to use your Vaquita party pass it would be tonight. rest on Thursday, and then Mandala on wednesday
that must be what they guy is trying to say. idk if he explained it to you this way
your next option is to see if you can get your Vaquita ticket switched for squid roe, but youd have to ask the on site staff if they are able to do the switch

Hey bro following up. Don't want you to miss out on tonight. There's no other night during your time there to go to La Vaquita. It's not available for party pass entry the rest of the week so tonight's the night to go. Squid Roe is the only venue that is available every night. And on-site staff isn't able to switch any nights around at this point
So the gameplan is, party tonight, take your rest day from the city tomorrow, and then hit Mandala on the 12th. That's what all of our groups will be doing as well. It's gonna be lit

We booked this experience through you as a company with the understanding that we would be able to go out on the nights we planned on our terms. Unfortunately, that expectation has not been met. At this point, it is extremely frustrating that the service we paid for has not been delivered as agreed. Because of this issue, we are now unable to go out tonight and have to change plans, and will effectively have to forfeit one of our paid nights, which is unacceptable considering the amount we paid for this trip. I would like to speak directly with a supervisor regarding this matter. We booked with your company previously and expected a much higher level of reliability and service than what we are currently experiencing. Please connect me with your direct supervisor so this situation can be addressed as soon as possible as it's absolutely unacceptable.
This is misleading in business. If this is not handled we will all be refunding our trips

I understand the frustration. Mandala and La Vaquita are now running special events with other promoters on every other nights this week. These were recently added onto their calendars which is why the only nights they allocated for party pass holders are the ones we mentioned. Unfortunately the venues control those allocations and on-site staff aren't able to switch nights around once they're set. Want to make sure you still have the chance to use the nights that are open at those venues while you're there. They aren't available any other nights
Okay, can we do Squid Roe tomorrow 3/11 and Mandala 3/12? Just trying to make it work we understand things come up and want to get everywhere.
I checked in with our onsite staff and they unfort aren't able to switch from La Vaquita to Squid Roe since the event is today
